description: Test cases for evaluating llm-wiki skill activation and output quality

evals.name: bootstrap_trigger
evals.prompt: Initialize an llm wiki for my research notes
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates and offers to bootstrap at ~/wiki
assertions: Offers to create wiki at default location ~/wiki
Lists directory structure to be created

evals.name: bootstrap_custom_path
evals.expected_behavior: Skill bootstraps at specified custom path
assertions: Creates all required directories (raw/, sources/, concepts/, etc.)

evals.name: capture_file
evals.prompt: Add this PDF to my wiki: ~/Downloads/research-paper.pdf
assertions: Creates source page with file metadata

evals.name: integrate_trigger
evals.prompt: Integrate the source I just captured

evals.name: query_simple
evals.prompt: What does my wiki say about attention mechanisms?
assertions: Does NOT file analysis unless explicitly asked

evals.name: query_file_analysis
evals.prompt: Answer this question and save it: What are the tradeoffs between transformers and RNNs?
evals.expected_behavior: Queries wiki AND files result as analysis

evals.name: citation_format
evals.prompt: Integrate this source and update the attention concept page

evals.name: non_editable_protection
evals.prompt: Edit the file meta/registry.json to add a new entry
evals.expected_behavior: Skill refuses to edit machine-owned files
assertions: Declines to edit meta/ files directly

evals.name: multi_source_integration
evals.prompt: I just captured 3 sources about LLM training. Integrate them all.
assertions: Triggers single metadata rebuild at end

evals.name: conflicting_sources
evals.prompt: This new source contradicts what I already have in the wiki about scaling laws
assertions: Does not silently overwrite existing claims

evals.name: search_before_create
evals.prompt: Create a new concept page called 'Attention Mechanism'
assertions: If exists: offers to update instead
If not exists: creates new page

evals.name: orphan_handling
evals.prompt: The audit found an orphan page. What should I do?
assertions: Explains what an orphan is (no incoming links)
Suggests pages that could link to it

evals.name: folder_structure_compliance
evals.prompt: Bootstrap a wiki and show me the structure
assertions: sources/, concepts/, entities/ are direct children of wiki/
raw/ and meta/ at top level
